"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\example64.dir/objects.a
C:\Qt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\example64.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\example64.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Qt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\gcc.exe -g3 -O0 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\example64.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o example64.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libexample64.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\example64.dir\linkLibs.rsp
